summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of VS Fashion website UI/UX restructure. All major navigation, layout, and functionality requirements successfully implemented with maroon/burgundy branding and modern minimal design.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Contact form submission returns 'Failed to send message' error
flaky_endpoints.impact: Users cannot send inquiries through contact form
flaky_endpoints.likely_cause: Email configuration (SMTP/Resend API keys) not properly set up

ui_bugs.issue: CTA button not clickable due to carousel overlay interception
ui_bugs.details: Carousel animation transitions cause overlay issues preventing button clicks

passed_tests: Header navigation: All center-aligned menu items (Home, About Us, Shop, Contact Us) clickable
Header right-side items: Cart icon and Admin button visible and positioned correctly
Shop page: Hamburger menu opens filter sidebar with collections/categories section
Footer tabs: FAQ's button displays 7 FAQ items with expand/collapse functionality
Footer tabs: Terms & Conditions button shows terms content
Footer links: About Us and Contact Us navigate to correct pages (/about, /contact)
Contact form: All required fields present (Name, Email, Mobile, Inquiry Note)
Contact page: Displays correct contact information (phone, email, owner details)
About page: Shows VS Fashion info and contact details properly
Brand consistency: Maroon/burgundy color (#8B1B4A) used throughout
Design: Modern minimal look with proper spacing and typography
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix contact form backend configuration - likely need to configure email service (SMTP credentials or Resend API key) for /api/contact endpoint. Also fix hero carousel CTA button overlay issue to make it clickable.
